name: tinymart
description: Miniature smart store platform — backend reliability demo

STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Stripe webhook signing secret (whsec_...) — only needed when receiving webhooks

BETTERSTACK_SOURCE_TOKEN.description: BetterStack Logtail source token (optional — falls back to stdout)

RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.description: Max requests per rate limit window

scripts.postdeploy: npx tsx node_modules/.bin/sequelize-cli db:migrate && npx tsx node_modules/.bin/sequelize-cli db:seed:all
